recommendations.title: Krisha
recommendations.overview: When Krisha returns to her estranged family for Thanksgiving dinner, past demons threaten to ruin the festivities.

recommendations.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: A musician plagued by insomnia is pulled into an odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

recommendations.title: It Comes at Night
recommendations.overview: Secure within a desolate home as an unnatural threat terrorizes the world, a man has established a tenuous domestic order with his wife and son, but this will soon be put to test when a desperate young family arrives seeking refuge.

recommendations.title: The Whale
recommendations.overview: A reclusive English teacher suffering from severe obesity attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.

recommendations.title: The Savages
recommendations.overview: A sister and brother face the realities of familial responsibility as they begin to care for their ailing father.

recommendations.title: Frida
recommendations.overview: A biography of artist Frida Kahlo, who channeled the pain of a crippling injury and her tempestuous marriage into her work.

recommendations.title: A Little Princess
recommendations.overview: When her father enlists to fight for the British in WWI, young Sara Crewe goes to New York to attend the same boarding school her late mother attended. She soon clashes with the severe headmistress, Miss Minchin, who attempts to stifle Sara's creativ

recommendations.title: The Iron Claw
recommendations.overview: The true story of the inseparable Von Erich brothers, who made history in the intensely competitive world of professional wrestling in the early 1980s. Through tragedy and triumph, under the shadow of their domineering father and coach, the brothers
